impact: Advances PP&D extraction guardrails by locking the expected seven public-fixture categories, source evidence linkage, confidence range checks, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications without live crawling or DevHub automation.
summary: Adds a narrow fixture-backed validation test for online trade permit purchase requirement extraction.
target_task: Task checkbox-122: Add a focused validation test for online trade permit purchase requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
